title: 11-13cm Wood Slice - Wedding Centre Table Decoration Log
features: These beautiful wooden slices look amazing at weddings or events.
Can be used as cake displays or even table centre pieces.

Please note that this is a natural product. The shape and size will vary. Due to the type of wood used there may be a small whole in the centre of the slice. This is a natural feature of Paulownia wood.
description: Wood Slice (XS) The perfect addition to a country themed wedding or outdoors event, capturing the beauty of nature in it's natural form These slices can form the base structure for any centrepiece design, add your own floral touch, candles or martini vase Please note natural products will always have small differences and imperfections - no two piece will ever be the same and the diameter may vary from one to the other. Dimensions of this log slice is an approximate depth of 2.5cm and a diameter of 10-12cm. Please remember these are natural products and the measurements will vary.
